description.en: Swin Transformer adapted transformers to dense vision by building hierarchical feature maps and limiting self-attention to shifted local windows. This made transformer backbones practical for classification, detection, and segmentation workloads that need multi-scale features.
description.zh: Swin Transformer 通过构建层级特征图并把自注意力限制在移位局部窗口内，把 Transformer 适配到密集视觉任务。这让 Transformer 骨干网络更适合需要多尺度特征的分类、检测和分割工作。

html.en: Swin Transformer adapted transformers to dense vision by building hierarchical feature maps and limiting self-attention to shifted local windows. This made transformer backbones practical for classification, detection, and segmentation workloads that need multi-scale features.
html.zh: Swin Transformer 通过构建层级特征图并把自注意力限制在移位局部窗口内，把 Transformer 适配到密集视觉任务。这让 Transformer 骨干网络更适合需要多尺度特征的分类、检测和分割工作。

html.en: Image patches are grouped into windows, attention runs locally, and shifted windows let neighboring regions exchange information across layers. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.
html.zh: 图像块被分组为窗口，注意力先在局部运行，移位窗口让相邻区域在层与层之间交换信息。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。

html.en: Experts generally treat Swin Transformer as a key step in making vision transformers competitive beyond image classification. Its long-term legacy is the hierarchical shifted-window design used by many dense prediction systems.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Swin Transformer 视为让视觉 Transformer 超越图像分类并进入密集预测的重要一步。它的长期影响在于层级移位窗口设计被许多密集预测系统复用。

artifact.zh: Swin Transformer 视觉骨干网络

material.en: ICCV paper and official code release
material.zh: ICCV 论文与官方代码发布

demo.en: Image patches are grouped into windows, attention runs locally, and shifted windows let neighboring regions exchange information across layers.
demo.zh: 图像块被分组为窗口，注意力先在局部运行，移位窗口让相邻区域在层与层之间交换信息。

text.en: Local attention windows are offset between stages.
text.zh: 局部注意力窗口在阶段之间错位。

text.en: Patch merging builds multi-scale feature maps.
text.zh: 图像块合并构建多尺度特征图。

title.zh: Swin Transformer：使用移位窗口的层级视觉 Transformer
